title: Lower Bicutan Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lower Bicutan with a Z-Score of +4.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Lower Bicutan is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 64%, while the wind speed is moderate at 14.0 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded, only cooling degree days (CDD) are relevant.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Lower Bicutan.
